title: GitStatus
description:
The result of a read-only `git status` inspection.

When the workspace is not inside a Git repository, only `schema` and `in_repo: false` are meaningful; the remaining fields carry their defaults.

branch.description: Current branch name, or `None` when detached/unborn or not in a repo.

in_repo.description: True when the workspace resolves to a Git repository.

is_dirty.description: True when any tracked file differs from HEAD or any untracked file is present (i.e. there is at least one status entry).

GitStatusEntry.description: One entry from `git status`. `index_status` / `worktree_status` hold the raw porcelain XY characters (a single character each; `" "` means unmodified in that column). `orig_path` is populated only for renames and copies.

kind.description: The editor-facing classification of this entry.

orig_path.description: The source path for a rename/copy; `None` otherwise.

path.description: Workspace-relative path (the destination path for a rename/copy).

GitStatusKind.description: The classification of a single status entry, derived from the porcelain XY code pair. This is the editor-facing label; the raw `index_status` / `worktree_status` characters are also preserved for callers that need them.

oneOf.description: Tracked content changed (in the index, the worktree, or both).
A new path was added to the index.
A tracked path was copied from another (carries `orig_path`).
An untracked path present in the worktree.
A path with an unresolved merge conflict.
An ignored path surfaced by status.
